name: Gilberto Gil
description: Brazilian recording artist, singer, guitarist, songwriter and politician
abstract: Gilberto Passos Gil Moreira (Brazilian Portuguese: [ʒiwˈbɛʁtu ˈʒiw]; born 26 June 1942) is a Brazilian singer-songwriter and politician, known for both his musical innovation and political activism. From 2003 to 2008, he served as Brazil's Minister of Culture in the administration of President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva.

about_quotes.speaker: Quincy Jones
about_quotes.evidence: Gilberto Gil’s the minister of culture. I’ve known him 45 years. One of the best musicians in the world... These cats don’t play... they’re my buddies.
about_quotes.doc_title: Quincy Jones — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Toots Thielemans
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWEE] And Gilberto Gil eventually became… He was one of the militant... And Gilberto Gil were in jail even. And lately… three, four years ago, Gilberto Gil was Minister of Culture.
about_quotes.doc_title: Toots Thielemans — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
